data.title: Replace silent trap in 5 post-* dispatchers with shared logging handler
data.description:
## testing_mode: RED

## What
In all 5 post-* dispatcher files, replace the existing silent 'trap exit 0 ERR' with the shared hook-error-handler.sh sourcing pattern and _dso_hook_err_handler registration.

## File Impact
| Action | File |
|--------|------|
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/post-bash.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/post-edit.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/post-write.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/post-all.sh |
| MODIFY | plugins/dso/hooks/dispatchers/post-agent.sh |

## Implementation
In each of the 5 files:
1. REMOVE: 'trap exit 0 ERR' (or similar silent trap)
2. ADD after _PLUGIN_ROOT resolution:

  _HOOKS_LIB_DIR="${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib"
  if [ -f "${_HOOKS_LIB_DIR}/hook-error-handler.sh" ]; then
    source "${_HOOKS_LIB_DIR}/hook-error-handler.sh" 2>/dev/null || true
    _dso_register_hook_err_handler "<dispatcher-name>.sh"
  fi

The fail-open behavior is preserved (ERR still results in exit 0) but now also writes JSONL log entry.

## Depends On
- 451f-2029 (RED test must exist before implementation)
